## [00:00 - 01:47]

Try this communication experiment with me. Seriously, try it. Stop being on this platform just acquiring knowledge. It's time to apply some of this damn knowledge. Try this with me out loud. I want you in a moment to say the words, I dare you to dream big. In a moment, just say it as you would in three, two, one, go. OK, now we're going to say the same thing. But this time on the word you, I want you to point your finger when you say the word you. OK, and then also on the word big, I want you to match it with a really large big gesture. We're going to say the same thing, except we're just going to change two gestures. All right, you ready? In three, two, one, go for it. What happened to your voice when you did it the second time round? It moved your voice. You see, your voice is connected to your body and your body is connected to your voice. People are often so afraid of a monotone voice, but they don't realize that a monotone voice comes from a monotone body. You see, the wisdom here is that when you move your body, it gives you better and greater vocal variety. When you use your body, it brings what you say to life. When you use your body, it creates visual engagement. And when you use your body, it gives you more presence and so much more. If you found this video interesting, join me for my final free masterclass that I'm running this year. I wasn't going to do another set of masterclasses, but so many of you missed my October masterclass, so I'm running one more this December. I've put the link for the masterclass in the comments below. Click it to better register. Can't wait to help you amplify the best parts of who you are. See you there.
